meta_description: Plan Palworld breeding routes from your own local save. The save stays in your browser; only owned Pal species, gender, slot, and passives are uploaded.

hero.title: Palworld Breeding Calculator
hero.subtitle: Import Level.sav to plan routes from your party, personal Palbox, and base workers to the target Pal and passive skills. You can also search general formulas without importing a save.

error.invalid_save: This does not look like a readable Palworld Level.sav. Choose the world Level.sav file, not a player save or another file.
error.oodle: The browser could not load the Oodle decoder. Refresh and try again in Chrome or another Chromium browser.
error.structure: This save structure is not supported by the current parser yet.
error.decompression: The save payload could not be decompressed. The file may be incomplete or from an unsupported save wrapper.
error.parser_failed: The save could not be read in this browser. Reload the page and try again.
error.parser_timeout: Reading the save took too long. Close other memory-heavy tabs and try again.
error.api_unreachable: Routes cannot be calculated right now. Try again shortly.
error.payload_too_large: The compact owned-Pals upload is too large for the calculator API.
error.invalid_payload: The calculator API could not read the compact owned-Pals payload.
error.unsupported_upload: The calculator API rejected the upload format.
error.api_server: Route planning is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
error.parent_required: Choose at least one parent Pal.

upload.replace_description: Choosing another save replaces the current Pal data and selected passives.
upload.action: Import save to mark owned and missing
upload.action_suffix: to show how many of each Pal you own in query results:
upload.title: Import save file (optional)
upload.payload_ready: {count} Pals owned by you were identified locally. Only their species, gender, source slot, and passive skills will be sent; the raw save and all other data stay local.
upload.clear_description: Clears only the parsed data in this browser. Your local Level.sav is not changed or deleted.

save_locations.title: Where is Level.sav?
save_locations.description: Find Level.sav in the location below, then select it or drop it here.
save_locations.backup_warning: Do not edit the original save. If you have several worlds, choose the world folder with the latest modified time.

steam_windows.note: Paste the first part into File Explorer. <WorldId> is the long folder name for a world.

game_pass.note: Open this WGS folder, then use an Xbox save extractor to export the Palworld save before uploading it here.
game_pass.warning: Xbox saves are WGS containers. Export or convert the save to Level.sav first.

steam_deck.note: Switch to Desktop Mode and show hidden files in Dolphin. If Palworld is installed on a microSD card, open that Steam library instead.

steam_linux.note: Some Steam installations use ~/.steam/steam or a custom library. Find app 1623730 under that library's compatdata folder.

dedicated_server.note: Start from the PalServer installation directory. For a rented server, open the hosting provider's file manager and locate this same path.

calculator.query_mode_target_description: Choose a target child Pal; optionally add a starting parent and inherited passives.
calculator.query_mode_parents_description: Choose Parent A and optionally Parent B to find possible children and formulas.
calculator.parent_placeholder: Search a Pal name or number
calculator.title: Breeding lookup
calculator.starting_parent_auto_hint: Leave blank to auto-select a starting parent from your save.
calculator.passive_locked: Import a save to choose up to 4 target passive skills. The calculator will use your owned Pals to calculate inheritance routes.
calculator.passive_placeholder: Search passive skill name or effect
calculator.passive_ready: Search all {count} passive skills. Skills found in your save are grouped separately.

results.title: Breeding results
results.parent_inventory_legend: ×N shows the number in your save.
results.parent_load_error: Breeding data could not be loaded. Check your connection and retry.
results.target_already_owned: Your save already has {count} matching target Pals
results.target_already_owned_description: You can use an existing Pal now; the breeding routes remain available for further breeding.
results.formula_starting_parent: Searching up to 3 breeding generations from {pal}. Save ownership is not checked.
results.no_routes: No breeding options were found for the selected target and passives.
results.starting_parent_not_owned: {pal} was selected as the starting parent, but it is not in this save. Choose an owned Pal or leave the field blank for automatic selection.
results.no_matching_routes: No breeding results match this search.
results.search_placeholder: Search by Pal name, number, or passive skill
results.excluded_by_policy: {count} candidate breeding formulas with more than 3 blockers were excluded.
results.search_truncated: Search limit reached. Showing the best {count} routes found so far; more eligible routes may exist.
results.search_truncated_empty: Search reached the computation limit before finding a displayable route. Results are incomplete; try fewer passive skills or choose a starting parent.

routes.requirements_title: Actions required to complete this route
routes.gender_reverse_target: Use on {pal}, parent {parent} in step {step}; target gender: {gender}.
routes.implant_instruction: After breeding, use the matching passive skill implant on the target child Pal.
routes.inheritance_notice: A route only shows that target passives can enter the offspring pool. In-game inheritance is still random and does not guarantee the target combination in one attempt.

open_source.title: Open-source save parser
open_source.description: The browser-side save parser is distributed under GPL-3.0-or-later so its local data handling can be audited.
open_source.unofficial: Unofficial fan-made tool. Not affiliated with Pocketpair.
